"Task
Module 1: Framing the Task  
This task involves developing a Java method to convert an input string into title case. The method must capitalize the first letter of each word, except for certain exception words like 'of', 'the', 'is', and 'and', which should only be capitalized if they are the first word in the string. The method must also handle exceptions properly and ensure the first letter of the string is always capitalized.

Module 2: Reasoning Process  
The method will process the input string character by character. It will split the string into words, check if each word is an exception word, and capitalize it only if it is not an exception word or if it is the first word. The method will use a list of exception words to determine which words should be lowercase. It will also ensure that the first character of the entire string is capitalized.

Module 3: Formatting and Output  
The output will be a string in title case, with the first letter of each word capitalized, except for the exception words. The method will return the transformed string. The output will be formatted as a single string with no additional formatting or separation.

Module 4: Error Prevention and Validation  
The method will handle exceptions by checking if a word is in the exception list. If it is, the word will remain lowercase unless it is the first word. The method will also ensure that the first character of the string is capitalized. It will validate that the input string is not null and that the exception list is properly defined.

Task"
